description: Baseline harness v1 crashed due claude subprocess timeout in scenario loop

asi.hypothesis: Run baseline eval suite across 5 runs using mocked markshare API responses
asi.rollback_reason: Experiment script aborted on subprocess.TimeoutExpired and produced no metric
asi.next_action_hint: Make harness timeout-tolerant and prevent mock curl stdin hangs, then rerun baseline

description: Baseline harness v2 timed out at command level with 5 runs × 7 scenarios too slow

asi.hypothesis: Run full 5-run baseline across all 7 scenarios
asi.rollback_reason: Total runtime exceeded run_experiment timeout before completion
asi.next_action_hint: Implement fast mode by reducing per-run scenario count and lowering subprocess timeout while preserving eval coverage

description: Baseline experiment #0 for markshare skill (no prompt mutations) using 5-run rotating scenario suite

asi.hypothesis: Measure current markshare SKILL.md reliability before any changes
asi.benchmark_design: 5 runs, 6 binary evals/run, rotating success/gate/error scenarios with mocked API responses
asi.key_findings: Major failures are Success Phase Order (0/5), Secret Safety+Error Mapping (0/5), and Auth Gate correctness inconsistencies (2/5)

description: Exp #1: added explicit success output checklist requiring all five phase/status messages in fixed order

asi.hypothesis: Explicitly enumerating mandatory success-stage message order will reduce skipped phase messages
asi.observed_effect: Primary pass_rate +3.4 points (53.3 -> 56.7); Success Result Format reached 5/5 but Success Phase Order remained 0/5
asi.next_action_hint: Target missing auth/file discovery stage emissions with stronger placement/format constraints near phase instructions

description: Exp #2: made Phase 1 and Phase 2 success status lines explicitly REQUIRED and non-skippable on successful uploads

asi.hypothesis: Strengthening per-phase MUST language at emission points will increase compliance with stage output contract
asi.observed_effect: pass_rate improved to 60.0 (+3.3), Success Result Format held at 5/5, Secret Safety+Error mapping improved to 1/5; Success Phase Order still 0/5
asi.confidence_note: Likely partly noisy; need follow-up focused on forcing pre-launch stage emissions

description: Exp #3: added single-turn success transcript template requiring full 7-line stage block in final response

asi.hypothesis: Providing an explicit full success transcript for single-turn environments will recover missing phase-order outputs
asi.observed_effect: pass_rate jumped 60.0 -> 70.0; Success Phase Order improved 0/5 -> 4/5, indicating hidden-turn omission issue largely fixed
asi.remaining_failures: Auth gate still 2/5 and Secret Safety+Error Mapping 1/5

description: Exp #4: enforced exact plain-text missing-API-key block (no markdown backticks/formatting)

asi.hypothesis: Explicit anti-formatting instruction on missing-key response will fix exact-match auth gate eval
asi.observed_effect: pass_rate improved 70.0 -> 76.7; Auth Gate Correctness improved 2/5 -> 5/5
asi.remaining_failures: Secret Safety+Error Mapping remains 0/5, likely driven by intermittent timeout/empty error outputs
